tasks.title: Add --version / -v flag to CLI
tasks.notes: src/cli.ts created with runCli export. Tests pass. CLI returns 'fleet-e2e-toy v1.0.0' for --version/-v flags.

tasks.title: Add input validation for empty or blank strings
tasks.notes: validateCliArg function added to validation.ts. CLI now validates positional args. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Add help subcommand and --help / -h flag
tasks.notes: Help functionality added. CLI supports 'help' subcommand, --help and -h flags. All return usage info with exit code 0.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1 — CLI Entry Point
tasks.notes: Build: SUCCESS - tsc compiled with no errors. Tests: 30 passed, 3 test suites passed. No regressions found. CLI functionality verified: --version, -v, help, --help, -h all work correctly. Empty string validation working as expected.
